languages.text: Много тысяч лет назад, Сангвиний принес величайшую жертву во благо Человечества — сойдясь в битве с Великим Предателем, он пожертвовал своей жизнью, дабы Император мог нанести Архиврагу решающий удар. Память о нем неукоснительно чтится всеми верными подданными Империума и по сей день. Адептус Астартес из ордена Кровавых Ангелов являются хранителями священного наследия примарха.

Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.
languages.original_text: Много тысяч лет назад, Сангвиний принес величайшую жертву во благо Человечества — сойдясь в битве с Великим Предателем, он пожертвовал своей жизнью, дабы Император мог нанести Архиврагу решающий удар. Память о нем неукоснительно чтится всеми верными подданными Империума и по сей день. Адептус Астартес из ордена Кровавых Ангелов являются хранителями священного наследия примарха.

languages.text: 数千年前に、サンギニウスは人類のために究極の犠牲を払った。大裏切り者との激戦で、彼は皇帝が敵の軍勢に決定的な打撃を与えるために命を捧げた。サンギニウスの記憶は帝国の忠実な臣民によって今もなお尊ばれ、現在、ブラッド・エンジェルス章のアドプタス・アスターテスは、彼らのプライマルチの聖なる遺産を継承している。
languages.original_text: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.

traits.locale_text: 数千年前に、サンギニウスは人類のために究極の犠牲を払った。大裏切り者との激戦で、彼は皇帝が敵の軍勢に決定的な打撃を与えるために命を捧げた。サンギニウスの記憶は帝国の忠実な臣民によって今もなお尊ばれ、現在、ブラッド・エンジェルス章のアドプタス・アスターテスは、彼らのプライマルチの聖なる遺産を継承している。

languages.text: 数千年前，圣吉列斯以人类之名做出了至高牺牲：在与首逆的决斗中，他献出了自己的生命，使帝皇得以对混沌大敌的军队施以致命一击。时至今日，帝国的忠仆们仍在缅怀圣吉列斯，而圣血天使战团的阿斯塔特修会战士们则肩负起了守护基因原体神圣遗产的重任。
languages.original_text: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.

traits.locale_text: 数千年前，圣吉列斯以人类之名做出了至高牺牲：在与首逆的决斗中，他献出了自己的生命，使帝皇得以对混沌大敌的军队施以致命一击。时至今日，帝国的忠仆们仍在缅怀圣吉列斯，而圣血天使战团的阿斯塔特修会战士们则肩负起了守护基因原体神圣遗产的重任。

languages.text: Binlerce yıl önce Sanguinius, İnsanlık adına en büyük fedakârlığı gerçekleştirdi: Başhain ile girdiği bir çatışmada, İmparator'un Şerbaşı'nın kuvvetlerine kati darbeyi indirebilmesi için kendi canını feda etti. O günden itibaren Sanguinius'un anısı, İmparatorluk'un sadık hizmetkârı tarafından şerefle anılagelmiştir ve Kan Melekleri Tümeni'nin Adeptus Astartesleri, Primarklarının kutsal mirasının koruyucuları vazifesini yürütür olmuştur.
languages.original_text: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.

traits.locale_text: Binlerce yıl önce Sanguinius, İnsanlık adına en büyük fedakârlığı gerçekleştirdi: Başhain ile girdiği bir çatışmada, İmparator'un Şerbaşı'nın kuvvetlerine kati darbeyi indirebilmesi için kendi canını feda etti. O günden itibaren Sanguinius'un anısı, İmparatorluk'un sadık hizmetkârı tarafından şerefle anılagelmiştir ve Kan Melekleri Tümeni'nin Adeptus Astartesleri, Primarklarının kutsal mirasının koruyucuları vazifesini yürütür olmuştur.

languages.text: Hace numerosos milenios, Sanguinius hizo el mayor de los sacrificios en nombre de la Humanidad: durante la lucha contra el Architraidor, dio su vida para que el Emperador pudiera asestar un golpe decisivo a las fuerzas del Archienemigo. Los sirvientes fieles del Imperium siguen honrando el recuerdo de Sanguinius hasta la fecha, mientras que los Adeptus Astartes del capítulo de los Ángeles Sangrientos custodian su legado.
languages.original_text: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.

traits.locale_text: Hace numerosos milenios, Sanguinius hizo el mayor de los sacrificios en nombre de la Humanidad: durante la lucha contra el Architraidor, dio su vida para que el Emperador pudiera asestar un golpe decisivo a las fuerzas del Archienemigo. Los sirvientes fieles del Imperium siguen honrando el recuerdo de Sanguinius hasta la fecha, mientras que los Adeptus Astartes del capítulo de los Ángeles Sangrientos custodian su legado.

languages.text: Il y a plusieurs millénaires, Sanguinius se sacrifia pour le bien de l'humanité. Lors d'un combat contre l'Architraître, il donna sa vie afin que l'Empereur puisse porter un coup décisif aux forces du Grand Ennemi. Aujourd'hui encore, les serviteurs fidèles de l'Imperium honorent la mémoire de Sanguinius, et l'Adeptus Astartes du chapitre des Blood Angels préserve désormais l'héritage sacré de son primarque.
languages.original_text: Many millennia ago, Sanguinius made the ultimate sacrifice in the name of Humanity: in a clash against the Arch-Traitor, he gave his life so that the Emperor could strike a decisive blow against the forces of the Archenemy. Memory of Sanguinius is honoured by the faithful servants of the Imperium to this day, and the Adeptus Astartes of the Blood Angels Chapter now serve as the keepers of their Primarch's sacred legacy.

traits.locale_text: Il y a plusieurs millénaires, Sanguinius se sacrifia pour le bien de l'humanité. Lors d'un combat contre l'Architraître, il donna sa vie afin que l'Empereur puisse porter un coup décisif aux forces du Grand Ennemi. Aujourd'hui encore, les serviteurs fidèles de l'Imperium honorent la mémoire de Sanguinius, et l'Adeptus Astartes du chapitre des Blood Angels préserve désormais l'héritage sacré de son primarque.

languages.text: Vor vielen Jahrtausenden erbrachte Sanguinius im Namen der Menschheit das ultimative Opfer: Im Kampf mit dem Erzverräter gab er sein Leben, damit der Imperator den Heerscharen des Erzfeindes einen entscheidenden Schlag versetzen konnte. Die gläubigen Diener des Imperiums ehren Sanguinius bis heute, und mittlerweile wacht das Adeptus Astartes aus dem Kapitel der Blood Angels über das heilige Vermächtnis des Primarchen.
